criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features in the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, and intelligent editing tools.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, and official documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, ratings, and expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of features offered by the app, including both AI and non-AI functionalities.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, official documentation, and expert reviews.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed, reliability, and efficiency of the app during use.
criteria.sources: User reviews, performance benchmarks, and expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, macOS).
criteria.sources: Official app listings and developer information.
